root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no , to_snumber(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance) as deposit_balance , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name , sysdate FROM sc_dep_m_creditor_item , sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type , sc_dep_m_creditor , sc_dep_m_rule WHERE sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no and sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code and sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.item_group = 'OPN' /*WHERE*/
